response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple companies (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog, Sociomantic) with strong language breadth (TypeScript, JavaScript, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrated production-scale work including low-latency micro-services handling millions of requests. However, the resume shows no explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or measurement/telemetry infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Current title is Staff/Senior rather than Principal, and there is no clear evidence of cross-team platform leadership at the scope IC6 requires.
strengths: 15+ years engineering experience with production-scale, low-latency systems at Sociomantic/Stripe
Strong polyglot background spanning JS/TS, C/C++, Java, DLang matching required languages
Demonstrated platform/tooling work (MCP code generators, GISCollective, test frameworks) showing systemic thinking
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis work
Career trajectory is Staff-level; Principal/IC6 cross-org influence not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering breadth and production-scale background
